errors: The ELM implementation has an age threshold mismatch. The CPG specifies an age range of 30-85 years, but the ELM implementation uses an age range of 30-80 years. The LDL Cholesterol threshold of 190 mg/dL matches the CPG requirements.
The HbA1c Laboratory Test value in the ELM implementation is specified as ">= 9 g%" which does not match the CPG requirement of ">= 6.5%". The unit and value do not match the CPG requirements.

The ELM implementation of the MeetsInclusionCriteria logic is incorrect. The CPG requires that all of the following must be true: Screening Age (age >= 40 years), AND Gender (female), AND Mammogram (no procedure in past 1 year). However, the ELM implementation uses an OR operator instead of an AND operator for the Screening Age and Gender conditions. The correct implementation should be: [MeetsInclusionCriteria] = [Screening Age] AND [Gender] AND [Mammogram].

The ELM implementation of the MeetsExclusionCriteria logic is incorrect. The CPG specifies that a patient meets the exclusion criteria if they have a confirmed active Connective Tissue Disorder OR are on active amiodarone therapy. However, the ELM implementation uses AND instead of OR, which would incorrectly exclude patients who meet both conditions. The correct ELM implementation should be:
The Value Set reference in the ELM implementation ("2.16.840.1.113883.3.526.3.1278") does not match the Value Set reference in the CPG ("2.16.840.1.113883.3.600.1542").
